title: FastaGcContentOutput
description: A Python script (as a string) produced by the Worker. The runner stores raw_output verbatim; future scoring extracts the script and runs it against sample.fasta.

extracted_python.description: Heuristic extraction of just the Python source (strips markdown fences if present). May equal raw_output.

execution_attempted.description: Whether the runner attempted to execute the extracted script. v0 leaves this false; scoring pass flips it.

execution_result.description: Populated only when execution_attempted is true. v0: null.
